name: domternal
desc: Modern, extensible rich text editor toolkit built on ProseMirror. Classic and Notion-style editors out of the box. Or go headless and assemble from 65+ tree-sh…
descFull: Modern, extensible rich text editor toolkit built on ProseMirror. Classic and Notion-style editors out of the box. Or go headless and assemble from 65+ tree-shakeable extensions. First-class wrappers for Angular, React, Vue, and Vanilla.
